narrative:
Waterford Twp township has 2,343 registered voters, with 50.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.9 percentage points.
